recommendations.title: Much Ado About Nothing
recommendations.overview: A modern retelling of Shakespeare's classic comedy about two pairs of lovers with different takes on romance and a way with words.

recommendations.title: Iron Man
recommendations.overview: After being held captive in an Afghan cave, billionaire engineer Tony Stark creates a unique weaponized suit of armor to fight evil.

recommendations.title: Spider-Man: Homecoming

recommendations.title: Mad Max: Fury Road

recommendations.title: X-Men: Days of Future Past
recommendations.overview: The ultimate X-Men ensemble fights a war for the survival of the species across two time periods as they join forces with their younger selves in an epic battle that must change the past – to save our future.
